'''√r-d-d''' ('''karadad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:curtain|curtain]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-d-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:curtain|curtain]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √r-d-d
|-
! Lemma
| karadad
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thiradad || jiradad || shiradad || kiradad
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuradad || jujuradad || shushuradad || kukuradad
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuradad || juradad || shuradad || kuradad
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuradad || juradad || shuradad || kuradad
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || theradad || jeradad || sheradad || keradad
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothoradad || jojoradad || shoshoradad || kokoradad
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thoradad || joradad || shoradad || koradad
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thoradad || joradad || shoradad || koradad
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || radad || radad || radad || radad
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || radad || radad || radad || radad
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || radad || radad || radad || radad
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || radad || radad || radad || radad
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæradad || jæradad || shæradad || kæradad
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thatharadad || jajaradad || shasharadad || kakaradad
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || tharadad || jaradad || sharadad || karadad
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || tharadad || jaradad || sharadad || karadad
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || sharadad
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || gosharadad
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokisharadad
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || sharadadnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gosharadadnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokisharadadnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || sharadadshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gosharadadnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokisharadadshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || sharadadro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gosharadadnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokisharadadro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || sharadadmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gosharadadnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokisharadadmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || sharadadsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gosharadadnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokisharadadsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || sharadadng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gosharadadnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokisharadadng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || sharadadya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gosharadadnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokisharadadya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || sharadadyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gosharadadnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokisharadadyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || sharadadnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gosharadadnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokisharadadnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || sharadadnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gosharadadnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokisharadadnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || sharadadnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gosharadadnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokisharadadnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || sharadadshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gosharadadnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokisharadadshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || sharadadshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gosharadadnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokisharadadshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || sharadadshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gosharadadnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokisharadadshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || sharadadronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gosharadadnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokisharadadronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || sharadadroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gosharadadnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokisharadadroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || sharadadromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gosharadadnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokisharadadromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || sharadadmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gosharadadnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokisharadadmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || sharadadmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gosharadadnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokisharadadmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || sharadadmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gosharadadnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokisharadadmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
